src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxAp.general_idea: Implement RuntimeHintsRegistrar to register specific resources for GraalVM native image generation.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxAp.why_exists: Without this, resources like ErrorMessages.properties and JS scripts are not available at runtime in a GraalVM native image, leading to runtime errors or missing functionality.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Implement the BaseExecutor interface to standardize the executor contract.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.why_exists: Class no longer implements the required interface, causing compilation errors if the interface is enforced by the framework or other classes.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Change execute method return type to List<byte[]> to comply with interface.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.why_exists: Method signature does not match interface definition.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Convert switch statement to expression to return results directly.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.why_exists: Method now requires a return value; void switch statement cannot provide it.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Add default case to switch expression returning empty list.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.why_exists: Switch expression must be exhaustive; missing default causes compilation error.
